news_items.headline: Wroad block: Dodgers 4, Phillies 2
news_items.summary: Phils’ drop first 2026 rematch against NL nemesis

news_items.headline: Munetaka Murakami injury update: White Sox star likely to miss time
news_items.summary: Munetaka Murakami left the Chicago White Sox's victory against the Detroit Tigers in the third inning on Friday. Here's the latest.

news_items.headline: Rodón's gem, 4-run 1st inning push Yankees' winning streak to 5
Yankees bats stay hot, Carlos Rodon cruises in 8-2 win over Athletics
news_items.summary: The Yankees mashed three home runs and Carlos Rodon pitched his best game since coming off the IL as New York defeated the Athletics, 8-2, on Friday night in West Sacramento.

news_items.headline: Dodgers hit 4 solo homers, hand Zack Wheeler first loss
news_items.summary: Justin Wrobleski was dominant and struck out 9 over 7 innings.

news_items.headline: Rockies 8, Giants 6: Tovar walks off Giants after wild ninth-inning comeback
news_items.summary: ﻿Hunter Goodman tied it with a three-run homer in the ninth, and Ezequiel Tovar’s second homer of the night gave the Rockies their first walk-off win of the season.

news_items.headline: Wrobleski's 9 K's, Dodgers' 4 HRs vs. Wheeler too much for Phils
Cubs Minor League Wrap: I-Cubs stop Indy, 8-3
news_items.summary: South Bend blows a lead and their winning streak. Iowa and Myrtle Beach start winning streaks.

news_items.headline: Mets' bullpen comes up big in extra innings win against Marlins
news_items.summary: The Mets needed seven pitchers to get through 10 innings in their 9-7 win on Friday night against the Miami Marlins and a few guys stood out in particular.

news_items.headline: Murakami set for imaging after exiting with right hamstring tightness
Mets' MJ Melendez calls walk-off HR a 'surreal feeling' amid recent struggles
news_items.summary: Despite his recent struggles, MJ Melendez found a way to come through for the Mets when it mattered most on Friday night.

news_items.headline: 'Trop Off' craze attracts a familiar face: Former Ray Brett Phillips
Vargas' 1st career walk-off HR sends packed Rate Field into euphoria
White Sox star Murakami (hamstring) exits early
news_items.summary: White Sox first baseman Munetaka Murakami left Friday's game against the Tigers in the third inning because of right hamstring tightness.

news_items.headline: Athletics' Severino injured, exits after one innin...
news_items.summary: Athletics right-hander Luis Severino left his start against the Yankees after one inning Friday night because of right arm soreness, the team said.

news_items.headline: Mets bump Peterson from rotation for Manaea
news_items.summary: The Mets are demoting David Peterson, an All-Star in 2025, to the bullpen and replacing him in the rotation with Sean Manaea.

news_items.headline: Mize lands on IL, further depleting Tigers' rotati...
news_items.summary: The Tigers placed starter Casey Mize on the IL with right adductor inflammation on Friday.

news_items.headline: Mariners' Raleigh takes 1st swings off tee in reha...
news_items.summary: Cal Raleigh, who was placed on the injured list May 14 with a right oblique strain, took his first swings since the Seattle Mariners catcher aggravated an injury to his right side.

news_items.headline: Dodgers make flurry of moves to reshape bench
news_items.summary: Dodgers have made a flurry of moves to remake their bench after injuries to starting outfielder Teoscar Hernández and utility man Kiké Hernández.

news_items.headline: Brewers reliever Uribe gets 1-game suspension
news_items.summary: Milwaukee reliever Abner Uribe, who is appealing a one-game suspension and an undisclosed fine for his inappropriate actions toward the St. Louis dugout earlier this week, got the win Friday night in a 10-inning win over the Astros.

news_items.headline: Phillies' Nola on paternity list; Hoffman recalled...
news_items.summary: Philadelphia Phillies starting pitcher Aaron Nola was placed on the paternity list Friday, ahead of the team's three-game set against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
